input.question: Is there a relationship between professor hire date and their evaluation rating?

payload.question: Is there a relationship between professor hire date and their evaluation rating?

output.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.hire_date) AS INTEGER) AS hire_year,
  AVG(e.rating) AS avg_rating,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
  COUNT(e.id) AS eval_count
FROM professors p
JOIN evaluations e ON p.id = e.professor_id
WHERE p.hire_date IS NOT NULL
  AND e.rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY hire_year
ORDER BY hire_year;

visualization.title: Professor hire year vs. average evaluation rating

payload.sql:
SELECT
  CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.hire_date) AS INTEGER) AS hire_year,
  AVG(e.rating) AS avg_rating,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS professor_count,
  COUNT(e.id) AS eval_count
FROM professors p
JOIN evaluations e ON p.id = e.professor_id
WHERE p.hire_date IS NOT NULL
  AND e.rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY hire_year
ORDER BY hire_year;
